headline: Strategic angle — Implement forensic audit and board-led governance reforms to restore trust and regain ESG index eligibility (potential to recover up to ₹2,049.5 Cr (engine estimate) in lost revenue, engine estimate) (of ₹16396 Cr canonical event exposure)
what_matters: ESG score gap widens due to critical governance failure; likely index exclusion from DJSI and negative peer comparison.
Talent attrition risk and customer churn likely as trust declines; Edelman Trust Barometer correlation suggests impact on retention.

Triggers BRSR, GRI:205 (rationale: Triggered by any fraud disclosure, bribery allegation, insider trading investigation, or ED/CBI action. Also referenced for ISO 37001 certification.), COSO ERM, SEBI; regulatory deadlines for disclosure and remediation; risk of penalties and trading restrictions.
action: Strategic opportunity: Implement forensic audit and board-led governance reforms to restore trust and regain ESG index eligibility (potential to recover up to ₹2,049.5 Cr (engine estimate) in lost revenue, engine estimate) (of ₹16396 Cr canonical event exposure)
Competitive position: Significant loss vs ICICI Bank and YES Bank, who maintain stronger governance; likely loss of ESG index inclusion
